name: AskBiz
description: AI business intelligence agent for SME founders. Connects to Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop, QuickBooks or an uploaded CSV, and answers plain-English questions about sales, margins, stock, and pricing using the founder's real business data.

authentication.instructions: Get a free API key at https://askbiz.co/developers

skills.name: Business Intelligence Q&A
skills.description: Answer plain-English questions about revenue, margins, pricing, and forecasting using real business data.

skills.name: Sales Analytics
skills.description: Analyse sales trends, top products, and channel performance.

skills.name: Inventory & Stock Analysis
skills.description: Flag stock risks, dead stock, and reorder recommendations.

skills.name: Point of Sale Insights
skills.description: Surface insights from connected point-of-sale transaction data.
